title: Remove formulas section and industry growth percentage field

requirements.summary: Remove the 'View formulas' button from the CalculatorActions component
acceptanceCriteria: The 'View formulas' button is no longer visible in the calculator actions
The FormulasDialog component is no longer rendered or accessible

file_operations.description: Remove the 'View formulas' button from the action buttons section and its click handler that triggers the formulas dialog

requirements.summary: Remove the FormulasDialog component instantiation and related state from App.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: FormulasDialog is not imported or used in App.tsx
Any state managing the formulas dialog visibility is removed

file_operations.description: Remove the FormulasDialog import, remove the showFormulas state and setShowFormulas state setter, remove the FormulasDialog component instantiation, and remove the setShowFormulas prop passed to CalculatorActions

requirements.summary: Remove the 'Industry Growth Percentage' field from the DcfInputsForm component
acceptanceCriteria: The input field for industry growth percentage is not displayed in the form
No label or description text for industry growth percentage is visible

file_operations.description: Remove the FormField component and associated input element for industryGrowthPercent, including its label, icon, and description text

requirements.summary: Remove the industryGrowthPercent field from the DcfInputs interface and all preset configurations
acceptanceCriteria: DcfInputs interface no longer includes industryGrowthPercent property
All preset input objects do not contain industryGrowthPercent values

file_operations.description: Remove the industryGrowthPercent property from the DcfInputs interface definition and remove the industryGrowthPercent field from DEFAULT_INPUTS, EXAMPLE_INPUTS, and VERIFICATION_INPUTS preset objects

requirements.summary: Remove any references to industryGrowthPercent from the formulas registry and calculation logic
acceptanceCriteria: All calculations work correctly without the industryGrowthPercent input
No console errors or undefined value warnings appear

file_operations.description: Search for and remove any formula definitions that reference industryGrowthPercent in their expressions or value calculations, ensuring all remaining formulas compile and execute correctly
